name: Adt Force Merge Self PR
description: Merge your own PR through a protected branch when self-approval is impossible. Wraps the enforce_admins toggle pattern with verification before/after.
author: Lucas Santana

pt-BR.name: Adt Force Merge Self PR
pt-BR.description: Faça merge do seu próprio PR através de uma branch protegida quando o self-approval é impossível. Envolve o padrão de toggle do enforce_admins.
